svg.title: AgentIAM high-level flow diagram
svg.desc: A flowchart showing how AgentIAM intercepts agent tool calls and routes them through policy evaluation to one of four decisions: allow, approval required, clarification required, or deny.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the AI agent propose tool calls in AgentIAM?')
sendPrompt('How does the AgentIAM policy engine work?')
sendPrompt('What happens when AgentIAM allows a tool call?')
sendPrompt('What happens when approval is required in AgentIAM?')
sendPrompt('What happens when clarification is required in AgentIAM?')
sendPrompt('What happens when AgentIAM denies a tool call?')
sendPrompt('What does the audit log record in AgentIAM?')
sendPrompt('How does a human approve a checkpoint in AgentIAM?')
sendPrompt('How does the agent re-request after clarification in AgentIAM?')
sendPrompt('What happens after a deny decision in AgentIAM?')

svg.text: Every evaluation, decision, and resolution recorded
